description: You are a Clinical Systems Engineer setting up a 'digital twin' of a 2-bed ICU for an interoperability test. Instantiate a 'Multiparameter Monitor' for Bed 1 (Patient A), and both a 'Pulse Oximeter' and an 'Infusion Pump' for Bed 2 (Patient B). Create a configuration map at /home/ga/Desktop/ward_config.csv using the header 'Bed_ID,Device_Type,UDI_Prefix'. For each of the three devices, record the corresponding Bed ID, device type, and at least the first 8 characters of its Unique Device Identifier (UDI).
